unavailableMessage: This invitation is invalid, unavailable, or has expired.
loginPrompt: Sign in or create an account to join this circle. We'll bring you right back here.
genericError: The request could not be completed. Please try again.

organizer.circleMissing: The server did not return this circle.
organizer.completedLocked: This circle is completed. Membership and payout order cannot be changed.
organizer.startedLocked: Membership, additional positions, and payout order are locked after the circle starts. New hands cannot be added.
organizer.shareCircleSubtitle: Code or general link — unmatched joiners go to pending requests
organizer.claimSubtitle: Each unclaimed hand has its own secure claim link. Share the correct link so the person connects to that payout position.
organizer.allClaimedSubtitle: Every planned hand is connected to a CircuSave account. You can still share the circle code for new join requests.
organizer.handLimitMessage: Free accounts are limited to 20 hands per circle. Upgrade to Premium to add more.
organizer.addPlannedSubtitle: Creates an unclaimed roster position. Share the hand's claim invite after saving.
organizer.fullNameRequiredMessage: Enter the person you want to invite.
organizer.contactRequiredMessage: Enter a phone number or email address.
organizer.premiumLimit: This premium circle already has {{count}} participating hands.
organizer.freeLimit: Free circles support up to {{count}} participating hands. Upgrade to Premium for up to 50.
organizer.plannedAddedMessage: This hand is on the roster. Share its claim invite so the person can connect an account.
organizer.shareErrorMessage: The share menu could not be opened.
organizer.claimShareErrorMessage: A claim link could not be generated for this hand.

Join my savings circle "{{circleName}}" on CircuSave!
